title.en: Oh, I see! Now it makes sense! 이제야 이해가 됐어!

description.en: When you learn something new or your curiosity is satisfied! Practice expressing moments of realization with 아 그렇구나 and 이제야 이해가 됐어.
description.ko: 몰랐던 사실을 새롭게 알게 되거나 궁금증이 풀렸을 때! 아 그렇구나와 이제야 이해가 됐어를 사용해 깨달음의 순간을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Realization. Understanding. Insight. Learning. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. why do Koreans always ask "Did you eat?" even when it's not lunchtime?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그건 한국에서 아주 오래전부터 전해 내려온 따뜻한 인사법이에요.
content.translation: That's a warm way of greeting that has been passed down for a long time in Korea.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 예전에는 끼니를 챙기는 게 어려웠던 시절이 있어서 서로의 안부를 묻는 말이 된 거죠.
content.translation: In the past. there were times when it was hard to afford meals. so it became a way to check on each other's well-being.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Oh, I see! 아 그렇구나!
content.translation: Oh, I see! Oh, I see!

content.speaker: John
content.text: I thought everyone was inviting me to lunch! 이제야 이해가 됐어요.
content.translation: I thought everyone was inviting me to lunch! Now it finally makes sense.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아, 그렇구나. This sounds like a light bulb going off in my head.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 몰랐던 정보를 새롭게 알게 되었을 때 가장 많이 쓰는 리액션이에요.
content.translation: Right. It's the most common reaction when you learn new information you didn't know.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 상대방의 설명에 고개를 끄덕이며 이 말을 해주면 아주 자연스러워요.
content.translation: It's very natural if you say this while nodding to someone's explanation.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아 그렇구나.
content.translation: Oh, I see.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 이제야 이해가 됐어.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이건 복잡하거나 궁금했던 점이 완벽하게 정리되었을 때 써요.
content.translation: This is used when something complex or something you were curious about is perfectly organized.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "드디어 알겠다" 라는 시원한 느낌이 담겨 있는 표현이죠.
content.translation: It's an expression that carries a refreshing feeling of "I finally get it."

content.speaker: John
content.text: 이제야 이해가 됐어.
content.translation: Now it makes sense.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine Mina is explaining why we shouldn't drink iced coffee in the middle of winter in Korea.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 한국에는 얼죽아라는 말이 있어요.
content.translation: John. there's a saying called 'Eol-juk-ah' in Korea.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아무리 추워도 아이스 아메리카노를 마시는 사람들이 정말 많거든요.
content.translation: There are really many people who drink iced Americano no matter how cold it is.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I was so confused why people were holding ice cups in the snow!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 한국 사람들에게 차가운 커피는 단순한 음료 이상의 열정 같은 거예요.
content.translation: For Koreans. iced coffee is more of a passion than just a drink.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아 그렇구나! 그래서 다들 그렇게 얼음 컵을 들고 다녔던 거네요.
content.translation: Oh, I see! That's why everyone was carrying ice cups like that.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 한국인들의 아이스 커피 사랑. 이제야 이해가 됐어요!
content.translation: Koreans' love for iced coffee. Now it finally makes sense!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이제 존도 진정한 한국 전문가가 다 됐네요!
content.translation: Now you've become a true Korean expert. John!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Learning new things is always exciting. especially with the right reactions.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 궁금한 게 생기면 참지 말고 물어보세요.
content.translation: Right. If you have something you're curious about. don't hold back and ask.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 오늘 배운 표현들로 여러분의 깨달음을 멋지게 표현해 보시길 바랄게요!
content.translation: And I hope you express your realizations wonderfully with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "realization" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아! 그렇구나! Oh, I see!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 이제야 이해가 됐어! Now it makes sense!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아! 이제 알겠다! Oh, now I get it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 궁금증이 풀렸어! My curiosity is satisfied!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 무릎을 탁 치게 되네! That's a real aha moment!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 새로운 것을 배우고 무릎을 탁 치는 유익한 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a productive day learning new things and having 'aha' moments today.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 복잡한 문제가 드디어 이해가 됐어요. (I finally understood the complex problem.)
독서를 통해 깊은 깨달음을 얻었어요. (I gained deep realization through reading.)
부모님께 안부 전화를 드렸어요. (I made a call to check on my parents' well-being.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be useful. To be beneficial
vocabulary.example: 오늘 방송은 정말 유익한 시간이었어요. (Today's show was a truly beneficial time.)
그의 질문 덕분에 궁금증이 시원하게 풀렸어요. (Thanks to his question. my curiosity was clearly satisfied.)
존은 이제 한국 문화 전문가가 다 되었네요. (John has now become quite the expert on Korean culture.)
